label: Yemen War Begins
description: Saudi-led coalition launches airstrikes in Yemen, beginning a prolonged civil conflict.

label: Kunduz Hospital Airstrike
description: U.S. airstrike destroys MSF hospital in Kunduz, Afghanistan.

label: Paris Terror Attacks
description: ISIS-coordinated attacks kill 130 people across Paris, France.

label: Turkey Coup Attempt
description: Failed military coup attempt in Turkey; government declares state of emergency.

label: Dallas Police Shooting
description: Sniper kills five police officers in Dallas during a Black Lives Matter protest.

label: U.S. Strikes Syria
description: U.S. launches 59 Tomahawk missiles at Syrian airbase in response to chemical weapons attack.

label: Allied Strikes on Syria
description: U.S., UK, and France launch coordinated strikes on Syrian chemical weapons sites.

label: Christchurch Mosque Shootings
description: Terrorist attack on two mosques in Christchurch, New Zealand kills 51 people.

label: Saudi Aramco Attacks
description: Drone and missile strikes knock out ~5% of global oil supply; Iran blamed.

label: Soleimani Assassination
description: U.S. drone strike kills Iranian General Qasem Soleimani near Baghdad airport.

label: George Floyd Protests Peak
description: Over 200 U.S. cities under curfew following the death of George Floyd on May 25.

label: U.S. Capitol Storming
description: Pro-Trump rioters breach the U.S. Capitol building during the Electoral College certification.

label: Kabul Falls to Taliban
description: Taliban seize Kabul; Afghan government collapses as U.S. completes withdrawal.

label: Russia Invades Ukraine
description: Russia launches full-scale invasion of Ukraine across multiple fronts.

label: Hamas Attack on Israel
description: Hamas launches surprise attack from Gaza; ~1,200 Israelis killed, 250 taken hostage.

label: Gaza Hospital Blast
description: Explosion at Al-Ahli hospital in Gaza kills hundreds; both sides trade blame.

label: Iran Strikes Israel
description: Iran launches over 300 drones and missiles at Israeli territory in Operation True Promise.

label: Trump Assassination Attempt
description: Shooter opens fire at Trump campaign rally in Butler, Pennsylvania.

label: Nasrallah Killed
description: Israeli airstrike in Beirut kills Hezbollah leader Hassan Nasrallah.

label: Iran Ballistic Missile Barrage
description: Iran fires ~200 ballistic missiles at Israel in Operation True Promise II.

label: Assad Regime Falls
description: Syrian President Bashar al-Assad flees as rebel forces capture Damascus.

label: Israel Strikes Iran Nuclear Sites
description: Israel launches major strikes on Iranian nuclear and military infrastructure, beginning the Twelve-Day War.

label: Israel–Iran Ceasefire
description: U.S.-brokered ceasefire ends the Twelve-Day War between Israel and Iran.

label: Global Trade War Escalation
description: Sweeping U.S. tariff announcements trigger major global trade conflict and retaliatory measures.
